brand.name: Memorialize
brand.tagline: Custom keepsakes for people you never want to forget.
brand.heroTitle: Personalized 3D keepsakes crafted with studio-level care.
brand.heroSubtitle: Memorialize transforms stories, milestones, professions, hobbies, and meaningful details into premium custom figurines, display pieces, and gift-ready keepsakes.

owner.name: Sanskar
owner.shortBio: Sanskar leads Memorialize as the founder-operator behind a trusted keepsake studio, guiding each order with a careful eye for storytelling, finish quality, and gift-ready presentation.
owner.quote: Every keepsake should feel considered, lasting, and unmistakably personal to the person receiving it.

about.mission: Memorialize exists for people who want gifting to feel personal, polished, and lasting. The studio blends story-first design, guided concept previews, and handcrafted finishing to create keepsakes that look premium and feel emotionally specific.

values.title: Emotion before object
values.desc: Every design begins with the person, memory, relationship, and occasion—not a generic product template.

values.title: Boutique quality
values.desc: Concept approvals, finish choices, engraving, packaging, and quality checkpoints make the experience feel curated.

values.title: Technology with taste
values.desc: AI helps explore directions quickly, while human judgment keeps the final piece tasteful, warm, and brand-worthy.
